← Our Specialists

Dr. Rakesh Rawat

MBBS, MS (Bikaner)

ENT & Head & Neck Surgery

Availability

Mon–Sat · 10am–2pm
Wednesday: Off

📅 Book Appointment 📞 +91-756-888-3422

About

Dr. Rakesh Rawat is a senior ENT and Head & Neck Surgery specialist with over two decades of experience serving patients across Bikaner and Rajasthan. He completed his MBBS and MS from Bikaner, and has built a reputation for careful, thorough diagnosis and patient-centred care.

His clinical focus includes complex ear conditions, chronic sinusitis, nasal deformities, and head & neck tumours. Dr. Rawat takes pride in explaining diagnoses clearly, ensuring each patient understands their treatment options before any procedure is planned.

He has treated thousands of patients from across Western Rajasthan, many of whom return to Rawat Hospital for all their ENT needs and refer family members as well.

Conditions Treated

Ear Infections Hearing Loss Tinnitus Sinusitis Deviated Nasal Septum Nasal Polyps Head & Neck Tumours Thyroid Disorders Vertigo Tonsillitis

"Dr. Rawat identified the root cause of my ear problem in the very first visit. After years of going to other doctors without answers, I finally got the right diagnosis and treatment. My hearing has improved dramatically."

Suresh Kumar Chronic ear infection · Bikaner

RAWAT HOSPITAL

Rawat Hospital offers expert care for ENT issues like ear, nose, and throat allergies, sinuses, and hearing loss. We provide advanced treatment for head & neck cancer.

Rawat Hospital, C-24, Shastri Nagar,
Gate No. 3, Near Pawanpuri,
Bikaner, Rajasthan 334003
